# Axon

> Open-source, self-hosted AI command center.

Axon is an AI platform that remembers, listens, and thinks with you. It runs entirely on your own infrastructure with no cloud dependency.

## Core Features

- **Neural Memory Trees**: Persistent knowledge stored as Obsidian-compatible markdown files in local vaults. Confidence-scored recall, active learning, and automatic consolidation.
- **Voice-First Interaction**: Speech-to-text via Whisper, text-to-speech via Piper. Each advisor can have their own voice.
- **Specialist Advisors**: Organization templates provide curated advisor teams (startup board, family organizer, career coaches) with unique personas, vaults, and expertise.
- **Local LLM Support**: Run entirely on your hardware via Ollama. No API keys required. Optionally connect to Claude, GPT, or other providers.
- **Platform Integrations**: Slack, Microsoft Teams, Zoom, and Discord — advisors meet your team where they already work. All integrations run on your infrastructure.

## Links

- Website: https://useaxon.dev
- Documentation: https://useaxon.dev/docs
- Blog: https://useaxon.dev/blog
- GitHub: https://github.com/brandonkorous/axon
- License: AGPL-3.0

## Technical Details

- Self-hosted on your own infrastructure
- Local inference via Ollama for memory operations
- Flexible model provider support (Anthropic, OpenAI, local)
- Obsidian-compatible markdown memory vaults
- REST and WebSocket API
- Advisor SDK for building custom specialists
- Integrates with Slack, Microsoft Teams, Zoom, and Discord

## llms-full.txt

For detailed documentation: https://useaxon.dev/llms-full.txt
